azure-resource-lookup.description: Resolve Azure resource IDs, connection strings, and RBAC assignments from the current subscription

azure-keyvault.description: Read secrets from Azure Key Vault for local development (never commit secrets)

azure-ai-foundry.description: Query Azure AI Foundry projects, datasets, connections, and model deployments

azure-cosmos-db.description: Read and query Cosmos DB containers for context during development

azure-monitor.description: Query Application Insights logs and metrics via KQL for debugging and observability
